introSection: Marsh Mayhem is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride first opened in 2000 as Bug Out as part of the new the new Bugsville themed area. In 2010, the name was changed to Go Bananas. For the 2012 season, the attraction was given a repaint. In 2022, the name was changed again to Marsh Mayhem and the ride was repainted.

fullText:
Marsh Mayhem is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA.

The ride first opened in 2000 as Bug Out as part of the new the new Bugsville themed area. In 2010, the name was changed to Go Bananas. For the 2012 season, the attraction was given a repaint. In 2022, the name was changed again to Marsh Mayhem and the ride was repainted.



Red track and yellow supports.
